description: Unit test cases for the Payment Card Compliance Gate. Tests combinations of payment_card_data_present, compliance[], and payment_handling_strategy.

test_cases.description: Not triggered — no payment card data present
Not triggered — payment card data absent, compliance has unrelated entries
FAIL — card data present, compliance empty, no strategy
FAIL — card data present, GDPR only, no PCI-DSS, no strategy
FAIL — card data present, PCI-DSS declared, but no handling strategy
FAIL — card data present, PCI-DSS declared, handling strategy is empty string
PASS — card data present, PCI-DSS declared, tokenisation strategy named

inputs.payment_handling_strategy: Stripe tokenisation — raw card data never reaches our servers

test_cases.description: PASS — card data present, PCI-DSS + GDPR declared, full delegation strategy

inputs.payment_handling_strategy: Full delegation to Stripe — no card data stored or processed in-system

test_cases.description: PASS — PCI-DSS declared with alternate casing 'pci-dss'

inputs.payment_handling_strategy: Card data tokenised via payment provider
